appraisal.description: A brass key with cellar grime packed into the bow and a tooth pattern that never quite repeats.

clues.result: The key teeth have fresh frost only on the cuts that would enter a lock first.
UV light reveals a floor-plan line etched across the bow.
The bow is colder than the shaft, as if the handle was left outside.

appraisal.wrong_handling_consequence: If it leaves containment, nearby locks open at 3:04 and relock from the wrong side.

generation.concept_prompt: Local prototype concept for Cold Brass Key.
generation.model_prompt: Local procedural prototype model for Cold Brass Key.
